title: nephrodium deltoideum
intro: Nephrodium deltoideum, also known as the American shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matonia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, due to its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium deltoideum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are typically used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
